# Ascension Flight Deck v31

The Ascension Flight Deck is a browser-local guided launch surface for the public GoalOS demonstrations.

It serves both non-technical and advanced users by providing:

- guided journeys
- audience filters
- a live same-origin preview frame
- launch buttons for each demonstration
- a downloadable JourneyReceipt JSON

The page remains public-safe:

- no account
- no form submission
- no wallet connection
- no network request
- no analytics
- no cookies
- no localStorage/sessionStorage
- no user data wanted
